-Wno-format-security -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ChemDraw.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libRDKitChemDraw.so.1 -o ../../lib/libRDKitChemDraw.so.1.2026.09.1pre
